0311.title: Rifleman
0311.notes: Primary infantry MOS. Boot camp + 14-wk IRC at SOI. Gateway to all 03XX advanced paths.

0317.title: Scout Sniper
0317.notes: Secondary MOS. E-3+ in 03XX. Expert rifleman, 1st Class PFT, GT100+, no NJP last 12mo, Secret clearance, 24mo remaining. SSBC 10-13 wks. ~50% attrition.

0321.title: Reconnaissance Man
0321.notes: HZ contract or volunteer. Pipeline: GRC(9wk)+ARC(9wk)+CDC(8wk)+BAC(3wk)+MFF(3wk)+SERE(3wk). GT105+, 1st Class PFT, WSI swim, Secret clearance.

0372.title: Critical Skills Operator (Marine Raider)
0372.notes: MARSOC. GT105+, PFT235+ (260+ rec), Secret clearance, ≤2 NJPs. A&S Phase I (3wk Lejeune)+Phase II (3wk undisclosed)+MRC (39wk/9mo). Phases: P1 Basic Skills 10wk, P2 Small Unit Tactics 8wk, P3 Special Ops 10wk, P4 Mission Exec 11wk. Additional pays: SODI $1000/mo, jump $150, dive $150.

2336.title: EOD Technician
2336.notes: Lat-move only. Redstone Arsenal ~40wk. GT110 non-waiverable.

5811.title: Military Police
5811.notes: Fort Leonard Wood ~20wk. Bridge: FBI, DEA, city PD, US Marshals. Veterans preference.

8156.title: Marine Security Guard
8156.notes: Secondary MOS. LCpl-Sgt. 8wk MSG School Quantico. 38mo obligated service. Secret clearance. 2nd Class PFT. No NJP within 1yr. Embassy duty worldwide. Free housing + COLA. 3 posts over 4yr program.
